top_signals.title: Convicted FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried files formal request for Trump pardon
top_signals.summary: The cofounder of the now defunct FTX crypto exchange is currently serving a 25-year federal prison sentence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Robots drive $10B Amazon investment for European fulfillment centers
top_signals.summary:
Amazon has deployed 1 million robots, mostly in the United States. Now it is investing heavily to expand robot use across fulfillment centers in Europe.

The post Robots drive $10B Amazon investment for European fulfillment centers appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
